steps.action: Request GET /diagnostics/chain_coverage on the fresh validation server
steps.expected: 200 response exposes confidence counts/states for exact/heuristic/unresolved mappings
steps.observed: 200 response returned confidence object {exact:3, heuristic:0, unresolved:0}

steps.expected: Known mappings appear in diagnostics counts
steps.observed: All 3 discovered platforms were counted as exact and the confidence section was present

assertions.title: Contract resolution for unknown platform returns explicit 404

steps.expected: 404 with explicit { error: "not_found", message: "Contract not found: ..." } envelope
200 response includes platform_counts totals and contract_mapping section

steps.action: Check arithmetic invariants in platform_counts and contract_mapping
steps.expected: with_chain_identifier + without_chain_identifier equals total and counts are non-negative
steps.observed: 2 + 1 = 3 total; contract_mapping active_coins=8, coins_with_platform_mappings=1, coins_without_platform_mappings=7, all non-negative

steps.expected: 200 response lists discovered/canonical platforms with chain_identifier, name, and shortname fields
steps.observed: 200 response returned bitcoin, ethereum, and solana entries each with id, chain_identifier, name, and shortname

steps.action: Check for legacy alias IDs in asset platform list
steps.expected: No legacy alias ids such as eth, bsc, or sol appear
steps.observed: Only canonical ids bitcoin, ethereum, and solana were present; no legacy alias ids appeared
